Brian Maucotel of DEBLASE BROWN EYERLY LLP (310-575-9955), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Jose Alcaine & Maria Rosa

RULING:
DEFENDANT CATERPILLAR INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Caterpillar Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant sustained its initial burden. Plaintiffs failed to present evidence creating a triable issue whether Mr. Alcaine was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant. Even if plaintiffs had created a triable issue on that topic, defendant sustained its initial burden and plaintiffs failed to present evidence creating a triable issue whether such exposure was a substantial factor in causing or contributing to Mr. Alcaine's asbestos-related illness. Prevailing party to prepare an order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12436 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
